title: wedelia rosei
intro: Wedelia rosei, also known as the Mexican daisy or Wedelia, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Wedelia rosei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
